perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand on a city sidewalk at night in front of a Costco sign, gesturing excitedly toward the camera. (2) They turn and run down the sidewalk towards the entrance of a building labeled 'JC PARK'. (3) The scene shifts indoors to a department store setting where a series of close-up shots show various products: electric toothbrush heads, facial cleansers, air fryers, kitchen knives, and skincare products, many with price tags indicating discounts. (4) One of the women holds and presents several items, such as dental floss and lotion, while pointing at the price labels. (5) The video concludes with one of the women crouching next to a retro 'Ms. Pac-Man' arcade machine inside the store.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voices speak excitedly over an upbeat, fast-paced electronic background track. (2) A male narrator's voice joins, describing the store's opening and specific product prices, accompanied by 'ding' and 'whoosh' sound effects when prices are shown. (3) The background music remains constant and energetic, while the speakers maintain a fast, enthusiastic pace throughout the product showcases. (4) Ambient noise from the store environment is minimal but occasionally detectable during pauses in narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Decorative Hook: '挖寶必來！退貨的東西' (Must come for treasure hunting! Returned items) in large, colorful font. (3) Functional Text: '桃園JC PARK全新開幕' (Taoyuan JC Park grand opening). (4) Content/Tone: Specific price comparisons like '6,500變4,300' and '原價466 -> 280' displayed with emphasis. (5) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Travel to Location -> Rapid Product Showcase -> Outro/CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male passerby in red, 1 female shopper in background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young Asian women; one wears a lavender short-sleeved top and ripped jeans, the other wears a black off-the-shoulder blouse and a tan bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts on a night-time city street near a Costco; transitions to the interior of a brightly lit JC Park store featuring warehouse-style shelving and retail displays.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Street lights at night and bright, even indoor retail lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Journey -> Evidence-based Showcase -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video acts as a shopping guide and promotion for JC Park in Taoyuan, informing viewers that it sells returned items from Costco at significantly reduced prices. It aims to drive foot traffic by highlighting the 'treasure hunt' aspect and the substantial savings available on well-known brands.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal recommendation of the store location and visual emphasis on the low prices compared to original retail costs.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-contrast price comparison text bubbles and enthusiastic 'running to the location' intro.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the popularity of Costco in Taiwan to promote a secondary retail market for returned goods, focusing heavily on 'value for money' as the primary motivator for the audience.
